mapper.select: SELECT m.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration WHERE meeting_id = m.id AND status = 'REGISTERED') AS registered_count FROM meeting m ORDER BY m.start_time DESC
SELECT m.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration WHERE meeting_id = m.id AND status = 'REGISTERED') AS registered_count FROM meeting m WHERE m.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meeting (title, description, location, start_time, end_time, capacity, status, creator_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{location}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{capacity}, #{status}, #{creatorId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meeting WHERE status = #{status}
